headline: Medtronic (MDT) Expands Partnership with Merit Medical for ViaVerte System
summary: Medtronic plc (NYSE:MDT) is included among the Dividend Kings and Aristocrats List: 32 Biggest Stocks. On March 24, Medtronic plc (NYSE:MDT) said it has entered into a distribution agreement with Merit Medical Systems to offer the FDA-cleared ViaVerte™ system. The product is a minimally invasive, implant-free basivertebral nerve ablation (BVNA) system. It is designed with […]

headline: Needham Reiterates Buy on Medtronic, Maintains $120 Price Target
summary: Needham  analyst Mike Matson   reiterates Medtronic (NYSE:MDT) with a Buy and maintains $120 price target.
